atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Use the `@tailwind` directive to insert Tailwind's `base`, `components`, `utilities` and `screens` styles into your CSS.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Use the `@apply` directive to inline any existing utility classes into your own custom CSS.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Use the `@layer` directive to tell Tailwind which 'bucket' a set of custom styles belong to.

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: Use the `@theme` directive to define your design tokens and theme configuration.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: Use the `@utility` directive to define custom utility classes.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: Use the `@custom-variant` directive to define custom variants.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: Use the `@variant` directive to apply styles for a specific variant.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Tailwind CSS v4: Use the `@source` directive to explicitly specify source files.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Use the `@config` directive to specify which config file Tailwind should use.
